title: artifact-review-decision
description: Machine-written record of a review verdict for a plan. Hard stages demand verdict exactly PASS — PASS_WITH_RISK is a conscious soft-accept, not a ship license. The presence gate does NOT verify the reviewer's role or distinctness from the author; the role check lives in plan_approval. Written to plans/<active-plan>/artifacts/review-decision.json.

verdict.description: Review outcome; hard stages require exactly PASS

reviewer.description: resolve_actor() output of the reviewing identity (attribution only)

role.description: Declared role of the reviewer (e.g. reviewer, lead); the presence gate does not verify it

rationale.description: Why this verdict — the human WHY, one paragraph

reviewer_engine.description: Optional provenance: which engine produced this review verdict. Additive/back-compat — an older review-decision omitting it stays valid; v1 records it (D6), a later version may gate on it.

reviewer_model.description: Optional provenance: the resolved model id behind reviewer_engine (e.g. gemini-3.1-pro-preview). Additive/back-compat, paired with reviewer_engine.

plan_hash.description: Optional hash of plan.md at review time: detects plan drift after approval

ticket_id.description: Seam for the task-store issue/MR link; optional

effort.description: Effort level of the review run; filled by recall-mode when a multi-round review ran. Optional for a single-pass review.

rounds_run.description: Number of review rounds completed; filled by recall-mode from the loop counter. Optional.

strategy.description: Name of the review profile (e.g. ship-grade, thorough) used for this review. Optional.

architecture_review.description: Present when the reviewed diff touched structural files (per standards.yaml drift.structural_globs); records that the reviewer loaded docs/system-architecture.md and judged drift. The gate is presence-gated on checked==true for a structural diff — NOT sha-match-gated at ship (doc churn must not invalidate a passing review).

checked.description: Reviewer loaded the SAD and judged architecture drift

doc_sha.description: sha256 of docs/system-architecture.md at review time (audit; NOT sha-match-gated at ship)
